_note: Starter-kit patterns — injected when ~/.omnicursor/learned_patterns.json does not yet exist. Replace with real learned patterns after first successful session.

patterns.description: Use git bisect to isolate the commit that introduced a regression before attempting a fix
Define Pydantic response models for all FastAPI endpoints before writing any handler logic
Write a failing test first, then implement the minimal code required to make it pass
Review async error-handling paths for missing exception types and unhandled edge cases before approving
Enumerate all affected files before starting multi-file edits to avoid missed dependencies
